q: Find all open issues in SMP
jql: project = SMP AND status != Done ORDER BY created DESC

q: Get me high priority issues from the Sample Project
jql: project = SMP AND priority = High ORDER BY created DESC

q: What issues in SMP are currently in progress?
jql: project = SMP AND status = "In Progress" ORDER BY created DESC

q: Show unassigned issues in the Sample Project
jql: project = SMP AND assignee IS EMPTY ORDER BY created DESC

q: Find all bugs in SMP project
jql: project = SMP AND issuetype = Bug ORDER BY created DESC

q: List all tasks in the Sample Project that are to do
jql: project = SMP AND issuetype = Task AND status = "To Do" ORDER BY created DESC

q: Show me critical priority bugs in SMP
jql: project = SMP AND priority = Highest AND issuetype = Bug ORDER BY created DESC

q: Get issues created in the last 7 days in Sample Project
jql: project = SMP AND created >= -7d ORDER BY created DESC

q: Find issues updated in the last 30 days in SMP
jql: project = SMP AND updated >= -30d ORDER BY updated DESC

q: Show me issues created this month in the Sample Project
jql: project = SMP AND created >= startOfMonth() ORDER BY created DESC

q: List all done issues in SMP from the last week
jql: project = SMP AND status = Done AND updated >= -7d ORDER BY updated DESC

q: Find medium priority tasks in Sample Project
jql: project = SMP AND priority = Medium AND issuetype = Task ORDER BY created DESC

q: Get all stories in SMP that are not done
jql: project = SMP AND issuetype = Story AND status != Done ORDER BY created DESC

q: Show me issues with low priority in the Sample Project
jql: project = SMP AND priority = Low ORDER BY created DESC

q: Find all epics in SMP
jql: project = SMP AND issuetype = Epic ORDER BY created DESC

q: List issues resolved in the last 14 days in Sample Project
jql: project = SMP AND resolved >= -14d ORDER BY resolved DESC

q: Show unresolved high priority issues in SMP
jql: project = SMP AND resolution IS EMPTY AND priority = High ORDER BY created DESC

q: Get issues assigned to me in the Sample Project
jql: project = SMP AND assignee = currentUser() ORDER BY created DESC

q: Find issues I reported in SMP
jql: project = SMP AND reporter = currentUser() ORDER BY created DESC

q: Show me overdue issues in the Sample Project
jql: project = SMP AND duedate < now() AND resolution IS EMPTY ORDER BY duedate ASC

q: List issues due in the next 7 days in SMP
jql: project = SMP AND duedate >= now() AND duedate <= 7d ORDER BY duedate ASC

q: Find bugs created in the last month in Sample Project
jql: project = SMP AND issuetype = Bug AND created >= -30d ORDER BY created DESC

q: Get all subtasks in SMP

q: Show issues without a due date in the Sample Project

q: List all issues in SMP ordered by priority
jql: project = SMP ORDER BY priority DESC, created DESC

q: Show recently updated issues in Sample Project from the last 3 days
jql: project = SMP AND updated >= -3d ORDER BY updated DESC

q: Find issues in SMP that were created this week
jql: project = SMP AND created >= startOfWeek() ORDER BY created DESC

q: Get all in progress bugs in the Sample Project

q: Show me issues that are either high or highest priority in SMP
jql: project = SMP AND priority IN (High, Highest) ORDER BY priority DESC, created DESC
